title: Raw captures
description: One raw ingested payload — the pasted body of an alert email, the pasted text of a saved-search results page, or a pasted link. The clipper parses each into zero or more canonical listings.

sourceId.description: the source this capture came from

searchId.description: the search this capture feeds (mirrors the source's search so agents can scan directly — db.query where is equality-only)

content.description: the pasted text — email body, page text, or a bare URL

sourceUrl.description: optional URL the clipper may webFetch for the full listing

summary.description: md — what the clipper extracted (n listings found, m merged into existing records)

listingsFound.description: how many listings this capture yielded (new + merged)
